# DexaFit Brasil

> DexaFit Brasil is a precision health testing network launching in Brazil, offering DEXA body composition scans, VO2 Max testing, Resting Metabolic Rate (RMR) testing, and Bone Density assessments. Currently pre-launch — accepting early interest registrations.

## What We Test

- **DEXA Scan**: Gold-standard body composition analysis with 98% accuracy (+-2%). Measures lean mass, fat mass, visceral adipose tissue (VAT), and bone density simultaneously.
- **VO2 Max**: Clinical cardiorespiratory fitness test. Research (JAMA 2018, Mandsager et al.) shows a 5x mortality gap between lowest and highest fitness quintiles.
- **RMR (Resting Metabolic Rate)**: Measures actual caloric burn at rest via indirect calorimetry. Eliminates guesswork from nutrition planning.
- **Bone Density**: Early detection of low bone density and osteoporosis risk. 1 in 2 women over 50 will experience a bone fracture (IOF).

## Why It Matters

- GLP-1 medications (Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro) cause roughly 1 in 3 pounds of weight loss to come from lean mass — without testing, this is invisible.
- Visceral fat (VAT) drives metabolic dysfunction, yet is undetectable without imaging.
- Standard health checkups measure nothing that predicts long-term metabolic outcomes.
- VO2 Max outpredicts smoking, diabetes, and hypertension as a mortality risk factor (122,007-person study, JAMA 2018).

## About DexaFit

- DexaFit is a precision health testing licensing network operating across the US and internationally since 2011.
- Brasil expansion is the first major international launch.
- Website: https://brasil.dexafit.com
- Contact: marketing@dexafit.com

## Status

Pre-launch. Accepting interest registrations across Brazilian cities. No active testing locations in Brazil yet.
